title: agropyron rigidum
intro: Agropyron rigidum, also known as the rigid grass, is a perennial grass species native to Australia and other parts of the world. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Agropyron rigidum include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and provide relief from respiratory issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
